source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Hint: Please answer the question and provide the correct option letter, e.g., A, B, C, D, at the end.
Question: In the circuit shown in <image>, assume that the voltage drop across a forward-biased diode is 0.7 V. The thermal voltage \( V_t = \frac{KT}{q} = 25 \text{mV} \). The small signal input is \( v_i = V_P \cos(\omega t) \) where \( V_P = 100 \text{mV} \).

The bias current \( I_{DC} \) through the diodes is ________

Choices 
A. 1 mA  
B. 1.25 mA  
C. 1.5 mA  
D. 2 mA
